case_title: GARNER, SILENA et al VS KAPADIYA, AMIT ANANT

docket_entries.description: COPY OF NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE MAILED TO PARTIES.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY KAPADIYA, AMIT ANANT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS THAT SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ON DEFENDANT KAPADIYA WAS DEFECTIVE. PLAINTIFF MAY RESET AND SERVE DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
TRIAL RESET TO APR-11-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE RE MOTION TO VACATE-GRANTED, SENT TO DUNBAR MELANIE RETURNED.
CONTC ORDER/COPY TO DEFT. RETURNED UNCLAIMED "RETURN TO SENDER...".

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GARNER, SILENA DUNBAR, MELANIE AS TO DEFENDANT KAPADIYA, AMIT ANANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT, FILED.

SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER WAS RECEIVED LATE. MOTION TO VACATE PRECEDED THE REQUEST; HENCE, COURT CANNOT TAKE COGNIZANCE OF THE SAME (SC-108) UNTIL AFTER FINAL DETERMINATION ON MOVAC IS MADE. REQUEST IS MAILED BACK TO SILENA GARNER.
